intro: DoorDash Scraper is a ready-to-run Apify actor from FlowExtract API for lead generation & business. Scrape store listings, full menus, featured items, and customer reviews from DoorDash with location-aware search, multi-URL support, and optional review extraction. This page explains what it does, who it's for, and how to get the most out of it — then includes the full technical documentation below.
useCases: store Identity name, description, cuisine type, business entity, and tag taxonomy with priority scores
ratings & Reviews average rating, total count, star distribution (1★–5★ breakdown), review count
pricing & Fees price range, delivery fee, pickup fee, surge indicators, DashPass eligibility
availability delivery ETA, pickup ETA, open/closed status, and full unavailability reasons

faq.q: How do I run DoorDash Scraper?
faq.a: Open DoorDash Scraper on the Apify Store, provide your input (URLs or search parameters), and click Start. Results are available as JSON, CSV, or Excel, and via the Apify API.
DoorDash Scraper runs on Apify's pay-as-you-go platform; you only pay for the compute/usage a run consumes. Check the actor page for current pricing and any free tier.
